pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.1.5 to align with the JDK 17 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JDK 17 as the baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with JDK 17 may work but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and is not the intended target stack for a 'Spring Boot 3' upgrade.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to match the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces a minimum Java version of 17; setting java.version to 11 will cause compilation failures or build errors due to incompatible bytecode targets or missing APIs.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/advice/Ap.general_idea: Replace javax.validation imports with jakarta.validation imports to align with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/advice/Ap.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist' on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.general_idea: Replace javax.validation import with jakarta.validation to align with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/controlle.general_idea: Switch from field injection using @Autowired to constructor injection for UserService.
Remove unused @RequestBody parameter from GET endpoint.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/dto/UserR.general_idea: Add Lombok @EqualsAndHashCode annotation to the DTO class.
Remove the id field from the UserRequest DTO.
Change the age field type from primitive int to wrapper Integer to support null values.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence imports to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.why_exists: The javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.general_idea: Replace javax.validation.constraints imports with jakarta.validation.constraints imports to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/model/Use.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime on JDK 17 with Spring Boot 3.
